response.justification: While the candidate exceeds the minimum 15-year experience requirement (20+ years) and shows entrepreneurial drive through GISCollective, they lack the core qualification for this role: recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated AI products or platforms. Current AI infrastructure work at re:cinq (3 weeks old) is too recent to demonstrate the depth required. The resume shows strong full-stack engineering across diverse technologies but no ML/AI specialization, academic AI credentials, or strategic advisory track record needed for a director-level AI strategy position.
strengths: Exceeds 15-year experience requirement with 20 years across diverse engineering domains
Demonstrated entrepreneurial capability as founder of GISCollective platform used by real organizations
Recent involvement with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks shows emerging AI interest
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise, published research, or AI-powered products in career history
Missing preferred qualification of Master's or PhD in AI-related field; only holds two bachelor's degrees
Limited evidence of strategic leadership, customer advisory, or director-level influence required for principal engineer role

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI products
Exceeds minimum experience requirement by 5 years
Proven entrepreneurial track record with GISCollective
